article_meta.title: Business Climate change study that overestimated economic impact is pulled — but not before banks relied on it By Taylor Herzlich Published Dec

reasoning: No attribution violations and some genuine author-level bias flagged, but it missed clear instances in the author’s prose (e.g., “still a big blow”/“catastrophic” and headline framing) and one label is questionable.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text is from the author’s prose; no quoted or attributed statements were flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Two items are defensible (subjective ‘massive’; framing ‘but not until after...’). The ‘faulty number... quickly made headlines’ item as Negativity Bias is questionable as bias rather than factual characterization.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-prose bias: “still a big blow, but not nearly as catastrophic as initially suggested” (loaded/subjective phrasing) and headline framing (“overestimated” + “but not before banks relied on it”).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labeling ‘massive’ as Sensationalism is defensible; ‘but not until after...’ as Spin is reasonable. Labeling the ‘faulty number... made headlines’ sentence as Negativity Bias is likely misclassified; Word Choice/Slant would fit better.
